summary: Forward Deployed Engineer with 5+ years shipping AI products and agentic systems at scale. Experienced collaborating directly with enterprise customers to scope technical requirements and deploy end-to-end solutions—from LLM integration and agent architecture to cloud infrastructure. Proven track record building production AI platforms that power 50,000+ users, with deep expertise in autonomous agent development, rapid experimentation, and enterprise-grade deployment.

bullet_overrides.24h-evolving-code: Designed and shipped a self-evolving agentic code system (generator/evaluator loop) that accelerated development velocity; implemented CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions to close iteration cycles in under 24 hours—directly applicable to autonomous agent workflows and LLM-driven code generation.
bullet_overrides.24h-aws-infra: Delivered end-to-end multi-tenant AWS cloud infrastructure for enterprise customers, reducing provisioning costs by 50% through automated resource management and tenant isolation; experience spans EC2, IAM, and serverless architectures critical for scaling AI systems.
bullet_overrides.24h-customer-collab: Collaborated directly with enterprise customers to scope requirements, remove deployment blockers, and accelerate rollouts of AI-powered systems; codified deployment playbooks and runbooks to standardize operational response across production AI infrastructure.
bullet_overrides.mdt-platform: Led end-to-end product development and launched a production platform that increased engagement by 30%; built and deployed autonomous agent systems in collaboration with stakeholders to automate customer workflows at scale.

skill_emphasis: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)

missing_keywords: GPT/Claude API expertise (implicit but not explicit)
